title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
title_es: AMIE de Google iguala a médicos en gestión de enfermedades
bajada: Un estudio en Nature demuestra que el sistema de IA conversacional de Google coincide con médicos de atención primaria en la gestión compleja de enfermedades. Este avance sugiere que los sistemas de IA podrían complementar significativamente la práctica médica.
bajada_en: A Nature study shows Google's conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management. This breakthrough suggests AI systems could significantly complement medical practice.

title: Fastest, Largest, Strongest: NVIDIA Blackwell Sweeps MLPerf Training 6.0
summary: Every breakthrough AI model starts the same way: with a training run. The infrastructure running those training jobs shapes everything: how fast teams can iterate, what scale of model they can build and whether those jobs complete reliably.  As models grow in size, complexity and intelligence, the demands on training infrastructure are also rising.  In […]
title_es: NVIDIA Blackwell domina MLPerf Training 6.0
bajada: La arquitectura Blackwell de NVIDIA barrió las pruebas de entrenamiento de MLPerf 6.0 con el mayor rendimiento hasta ahora. Estos resultados confirman que Blackwell es la infraestructura preferida para entrenar modelos de IA a gran escala.
bajada_en: NVIDIA's Blackwell architecture swept MLPerf Training 6.0 benchmarks with record-breaking performance. These results confirm Blackwell as the preferred infrastructure for training large-scale AI models.

title: Hands Free, AIs Forward: NVIDIA XR AI Brings Agents to AR Glasses
summary: NVIDIA XR AI is now available in public beta, giving developers a framework for building multimodal AI agents for AR glasses and XR devices.
title_es: NVIDIA XR AI en beta pública para agentes en gafas AR
bajada: NVIDIA lanzó XR AI en beta pública, un framework que permite a developers construir agentes IA multimodales para gafas AR y dispositivos XR. Esta herramienta abre nuevas posibilidades para aplicaciones de realidad extendida.
bajada_en: NVIDIA launched XR AI in public beta, a framework enabling developers to build multimodal AI agents for AR glasses and XR devices. This tool opens new possibilities for extended reality applications.

title: GLM-5.2: Built for Long-Horizon Tasks
title_es: GLM-5.2: modelo optimizado para tareas de largo horizonte
bajada: Hugging Face presenta GLM-5.2, un nuevo modelo diseñado específicamente para tareas que requieren razonamiento y planificación extendidos. La mejora en capacidades de horizonte largo lo hace relevante para aplicaciones empresariales complejas.
bajada_en: Hugging Face introduces GLM-5.2, a new model designed specifically for long-horizon reasoning and planning tasks. The improvement in extended reasoning capabilities makes it relevant for complex enterprise applications.

title: From the Hugging Face Hub to robot hardware with Strands Agents and LeRobot
title_es: LeRobot: del Hub a hardware robótico con Strands
bajada: Hugging Face y Strands integran LeRobot con la plataforma Hub, permitiendo a developers pasar de modelos de IA a implementación en hardware robótico. Esta integración reduce significativamente la brecha entre investigación y producción en robótica.
bajada_en: Hugging Face and Strands integrate LeRobot with the Hub platform, allowing developers to move from AI models to robotic hardware implementation. This integration significantly reduces the research-to-production gap in robotics.

title: Pramaana Labs raises $27M seed round from Khosla Ventures to bring formal verification to AI
summary: Pramaana will focus on highly sensitive verticals like law, drug discovery, and tax preparation — where errors can be costly and reliability is at a premium.
title_es: Pramaana Labs asegura $27M para verificación formal en IA
bajada: Khosla Ventures lideró una ronda seed de $27M para Pramaana Labs, que desarrolla técnicas de verificación formal para sistemas de IA. Su enfoque en sectores críticos como derecho y descubrimiento de fármacos aborda un problema de confiabilidad crucial.
bajada_en: Khosla Ventures led a $27M seed round for Pramaana Labs, developing formal verification techniques for AI systems. Its focus on critical sectors like law and drug discovery addresses a crucial reliability problem.

title: HPE AI Factory With NVIDIA Expands for the Era of Agents
summary: Enterprises are moving agentic AI from proof of concept to production — and the next generation of AI factories are built for the era of agents. At HPE Discover Las Vegas, running through Thursday, June 18, NVIDIA and HPE are expanding the HPE AI Factory with NVIDIA, including NVIDIA Vera CPU and NVIDIA Agent Toolkit […]
title_es: HPE AI Factory se expande para era de agentes IA
bajada: NVIDIA y HPE expandieron HPE AI Factory con herramientas optimizadas para agentes de IA en producción. La iniciativa reconoce que las empresas están moviendo agentes IA desde pruebas de concepto a producción real.
bajada_en: NVIDIA and HPE expanded HPE AI Factory with tools optimized for production AI agents. The initiative recognizes enterprises moving agentic AI from proof-of-concept to production.

title: ‘Dangerous’ AI Models Are Coming No Matter What
summary: The US government crackdown on Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 hides a glaring truth: AI models with advanced hacking capabilities will soon be the norm.
title_es: Modelos de IA peligrosos llegarán sin importar regulación
bajada: Un análisis revela que los intentos de regulación del gobierno estadounidense no detendrán el desarrollo de modelos de IA con capacidades avanzadas de hacking. La conclusión sugiere que la capacidad de explotar vulnerabilidades se normalizará en la próxima generación de modelos.
bajada_en: Analysis reveals US government regulation attempts won't stop development of AI models with advanced hacking capabilities. The conclusion suggests exploitation abilities will become standard in the next generation of models.

title: MolmoMotion: Language-guided 3D motion forecasting
title_es: MolmoMotion: predicción de movimiento 3D con lenguaje
bajada: Allen AI presenta MolmoMotion, un modelo que integra comprensión de lenguaje natural con predicción de movimiento 3D. Esta convergencia abre aplicaciones en simulación, animación y robótica guiada por comandos de lenguaje.
bajada_en: Allen AI introduces MolmoMotion, a model integrating natural language understanding with 3D motion forecasting. This convergence enables applications in simulation, animation, and language-guided robotics.

title: DeepL acquires Mixhalo for live-event audio streaming and translation
summary: With this acquisition, DeepL is opening an office in San Francisco to expand its U.S. business.
title_es: DeepL adquiere Mixhalo para traducción de eventos en vivo
bajada: DeepL adquirió Mixhalo, especialista en transmisión de audio para eventos en vivo, expandiendo sus capacidades a traducción simultánea de eventos. La compañía abrirá una oficina en San Francisco para fortalecer su presencia en EE.UU.
bajada_en: DeepL acquired Mixhalo, specializing in live-event audio streaming, expanding into simultaneous event translation. The company will open a San Francisco office to strengthen its US presence.

title: Collecting robot training data is dirty, unglamorous work. Some AI labs are already paying XDOF to do it.
summary: If physical AI is going to match the accomplishments of LLMs, there's a data problem that needs to be solved.
title_es: XDOF resuelve la recolección de datos para robótica
bajada: Labs de IA están contratando a XDOF para realizar la tediosa pero esencial tarea de recolectar datos de entrenamiento para robots. Este modelo de outsourcing aborda un cuello de botella crítico para el avance de la IA física.
bajada_en: AI labs are hiring XDOF to handle the tedious but essential task of collecting training data for robots. This outsourcing model addresses a critical bottleneck for physical AI advancement.

title: The Gemini-Powered Google Home Speaker Is Finally Here
summary: Arriving six years after Google’s last smart speaker, the new HomePod-style device was redesigned to play host to Gemini’s chatbot.
title_es: Google lanza nuevo altavoz Home con Gemini tras 6 años
bajada: Google presentó su primer altavoz inteligente nuevo en seis años, basado en Gemini. El dispositivo representa el primer producto de hardware que integra completamente los avances recientes de Google en IA conversacional.
bajada_en: Google launched its first new smart speaker in six years, powered by Gemini. The device represents the first hardware product fully integrating Google's recent advances in conversational AI.

title: The next humanoid robot might not look human at all
summary: The next humanoid robot might not have a head. It might not have legs. It might even sit on a wheeled base and fold down like a deck chair. But, as Genesis AI puts it, "humanoid robots don't need to look human." That explains the look of Eno, the new robot from the French startup […]
title_es: Genesis AI desafía diseño de robots humanoides
bajada: Genesis AI presenta Eno, un robot que cuestiona la necesidad de que los robots humanoides parezcan humanos. El enfoque funcional sobre la forma estética podría acelerar la adopción de robots en aplicaciones prácticas.
bajada_en: Genesis AI introduces Eno, a robot questioning the need for humanoid robots to look human. The functional-over-form approach could accelerate robot adoption in practical applications.

title: Canadian pension giant joins race to fund India’s AI-fueled data center boom
summary: The Canadian pension giant will acquire an 8.2% stake in CtrlS, a tech giant that operates more than 15 data centers across India.
title_es: Fondo de pensiones canadiense invierte en data centers de India
bajada: Un fondo de pensiones canadiense adquirió una participación del 8.2% en CtrlS, operador de más de 15 data centers en India. La inversión refleja el auge de la demanda de infraestructura de IA en mercados emergentes.
bajada_en: A Canadian pension fund acquired an 8.2% stake in CtrlS, operating 15+ data centers across India. The investment reflects surging AI infrastructure demand in emerging markets.

title: Google’s first smart speaker in six years arrives next week
summary: Google's first new smart speaker in six years starts shipping on June 25th, narrowly missing its promised spring launch window. Preorders for the Google Home Speaker open today, June 17th. Nothing has changed hardware-wise in the nine months since the $99 speaker was announced. It has the same slightly squished round design, with touch-capacitive buttons […]
title_es: Google Home Speaker comienza envíos el 25 de junio
bajada: El nuevo altavoz de Google comenzará a enviarse el 25 de junio tras meses de retraso respecto a la promesa de primavera. Los preórdenes se abrieron el 17 de junio con un precio de $99.
bajada_en: Google's new speaker begins shipping June 25th after missing its spring launch window. Pre-orders opened June 17th at a $99 price point.

title: Anthropic got hit by export rules nobody understands
summary: Anthropic has spent much of this week fighting to get its newest AI models back online after the Trump administration abruptly ordered the company to cut access for all foreign nationals, including users inside the US and its own employees, forcing Anthropic to block access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for everyone. "To my […]
title_es: Anthropic paraliza modelos Fable y Mythos por normativa de exportación
bajada: La administración Trump ordenó a Anthropic bloquear el acceso a sus modelos más avanzados para usuarios internacionales, incluyendo empleados extranjeros de la compañía. Esta acción ha generado incertidumbre sobre las reglas de control de exportación de IA.
bajada_en: The Trump administration ordered Anthropic to block access to its advanced models for international users, including the company's foreign employees. This action created uncertainty around AI export control rules.

title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
summary: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.
title_es: IA autónoma de OpenAI mejora reacciones en química medicinal
bajada: OpenAI y Molecule.one demostraron cómo una IA autónoma usando GPT-5.4 optimizó una reacción clave en síntesis de fármacos. Este avance abre nuevas posibilidades para acelerar la investigación farmacéutica mediante IA.
bajada_en: OpenAI and Molecule.one demonstrated how an autonomous AI using GPT-5.4 optimized a key reaction in drug synthesis. This breakthrough opens new possibilities for accelerating pharmaceutical research through AI.

title: The Korean Telecom Giant at the Center of Anthropic’s Mythos Controversy
summary: Days before Anthropic took its most advanced AI models offline, the White House ordered the company to revoke SK Telecom’s access to Claude Mythos over claims of alleged ties to China.
title_es: SK Telecom en centro de controversia sobre controles de exportación
bajada: La Casa Blanca ordenó a Anthropic revocar el acceso de SK Telecom a Claude Mythos por presuntos vínculos con China, días antes que la compañía desconectara sus modelos más avanzados. El incidente expone tensiones geopolíticas en el acceso a IA.
bajada_en: The White House ordered Anthropic to revoke SK Telecom's access to Claude Mythos over alleged China ties, days before the company took its advanced models offline. The incident exposes geopolitical tensions in AI access.

title: World leaders want American AI. They just don’t want America to be able to turn it off.
summary: French President Macron and Indian PM Modi raised alarms at the G7 summit that the U.S. could cut off access to American AI overnight  — a fear the Anthropic blackout just made real.
title_es: Líderes globales temen que EE.UU. corte acceso a IA estadounidense
bajada: Macron y Modi plantearon en el G7 preocupaciones sobre que EE.UU. pudiera desconectar el acceso a IA americana de un día para otro. El apagón de Anthropic convirtió este temor en una realidad tangible para aliados internacionales.
bajada_en: Macron and Modi raised G7 concerns that the U.S. could cut off access to American AI overnight. Anthropic's blackout made this fear a tangible reality for international allies.

title: Introducing LifeSciBench
summary: Introducing LifeSciBench, an expert-authored, expert-reviewed benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions.
title_es: OpenAI presenta LifeSciBench para evaluar IA en investigación
bajada: Se lanzó LifeSciBench, un benchmark revisado por expertos para evaluar cómo los sistemas de IA manejan tareas reales de investigación en ciencias de la vida. Es una herramienta clave para medir el progreso en aplicaciones biomédicas.
bajada_en: LifeSciBench launched, an expert-reviewed benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks. It's a key tool for measuring progress in biomedical applications.

title: The White House Wants Anthropic to Block All Jailbreaks. That May Not Be Possible
summary: Trump administration officials tell WIRED that if Anthropic wants to rerelease Fable 5, it will need to ensure the model's guardrails can't be circumvented. Security experts say that can't be done.
title_es: Casa Blanca pide a Anthropic bloquear jailbreaks, expertos dudan
bajada: Funcionarios de Trump exigieron a Anthropic garantizar que los guardrails de Fable 5 sean a prueba de jailbreaks como condición para relanzar el modelo. Expertos en seguridad advierten que cumplir este requisito es prácticamente imposible.
bajada_en: Trump officials demanded Anthropic ensure Fable 5's guardrails are jailbreak-proof as a condition to relaunch the model. Security experts warn that meeting this requirement is virtually impossible.

title: "Dangerous" AI models are coming no matter what
summary: AI models with advanced hacking capabilities will soon be the norm.
title_es: Modelos IA "peligrosos" llegarán inevitablemente, advierte análisis
bajada: Reportes indican que los modelos con capacidades avanzadas de hacking pronto serán la norma en la industria. Los expertos advierten que no hay forma de detener este progreso completamente.
bajada_en: Reports indicate that models with advanced hacking capabilities will soon become industry standard. Experts warn there's no way to completely prevent this progress.

title: Launch HN: Adam (YC W25) – Open-Source AI CAD
summary: Hey HN! I'm Zach from Adam (https://adam.new/). We're building AI agents for mechanical CAD software. We’ve built the company on two fundamental beliefs:- AI will be the primary medium for creating mechanical designs just like it is in software today.- The best paradigm for CAD generation is to generate CAD as code (text -> code -> CAD).We’re building CADAM, an open source Text to CAD platform. It's a React app (TanStack Start) with a Supabase backend for auth, database, and file storage. Think of it like AI TinkerCAD.Demo:https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iESOr7EGWqkTry it:https://adam.new/cadam/What it does:- Generates parametric 3D models from natural language, with support for both text prompts and image references.- Outputs OpenSCAD code with automatically extracted parameters that surface as interactive sliders for instant dimension tweaking- Exports as .STL or .SCAD (plus OBJ, GLB/GLTF, FBX, and DXF)Under the hood:- One agentic endpoint with two modes that swap system prompts and tools: a parametric mode that writes/edits OpenSCAD via a build_parametric_model tool, and a mesh mode that generates 3D textured meshes.- Simple parameter tweaks bypass the model entirely; adjusting a slider does a deterministic regex update on the SCAD source, requiring no LLM call.- Model-agnostic via the Vercel AI SDK: Anthropic (Claude), Google (Gemini), and OpenAI/others through OpenRouter, with adaptive thinking auto-enabled on newer models. Surprisingly, in our evals Gemini 3.1 Pro is the top model.- Runs fully in-browser by compiling OpenSCAD to WebAssembly (in a Web Worker, so the UI never blocks) and rendering with Three.js via React Three Fiber- Supports BOSL, BOSL2, and MCAD libraries, plus custom font support (Geist) for text in modelsFuture improvements:- Support both build123d and CadQuery. This will allow us to move beyond CSG primitives to constraint-driven modeling and provide direct comparisons to other code-as-CAD primitives.- Better spatial context: UI for face/ed
title_es: Adam (YC W25) lanza CAD generativo open-source con IA
bajada: Adam presentó CADAM, una plataforma open-source que genera modelos 3D parametrizados a partir de lenguaje natural, con exportación a múltiples formatos CAD. Representa una nueva generación de herramientas de diseño asistido por IA.
bajada_en: Adam launched CADAM, an open-source platform generating parametric 3D models from natural language with multi-format CAD export. It represents a new generation of AI-assisted design tools.

title: NEA’s Tiffany Luck says enterprises are still figuring out their AI ROI
summary: Tokenmaxxing was the hottest trend in Silicon Valley earlier this year, with CEOs encouraging employees to push AI usage as far as it would go. Then the bill came due. Uber reportedly blew through its annual AI budget in a few months, some companies cut Claude licenses for parts of their org, and Meta killed its internal leaderboard.  This tension between […]
title_es: Empresas cuestionan ROI de IA tras quemar presupuestos anuales
bajada: Después de meses de adoption acelerada, empresas como Uber reportan haber agotado presupuestos anuales de IA en semanas. El enfoque inicial de maximizar uso está dando paso a una evaluación más realista del retorno de inversión.
bajada_en: After months of accelerated adoption, companies like Uber report burning through annual AI budgets in weeks. The initial focus on maximizing usage is giving way to more realistic ROI evaluation.

title: Agentic Resource Discovery: Let agents search
title_es: Hugging Face lanza descubrimiento de recursos para agentes IA
bajada: Hugging Face presentó una nueva capacidad que permite a los agentes IA buscar y descubrir recursos automáticamente. La herramienta mejora la autonomía de los agentes en workflows complejos.
bajada_en: Hugging Face introduced a new capability allowing AI agents to automatically search and discover resources. The tool enhances agent autonomy in complex workflows.

title: Two-thirds of Americans think AI is advancing too quickly
summary: According to the latest Pew Research poll, 49 percent of Americans report using chatbots at least occasionally, but 63 percent think the tech is advancing too quickly. Overall, use of AI chatbots has increased dramatically since 2024, when only 33 percent reported using them. Specifically, ChatGPT's usage has doubled since 2023, with 44 percent of […]
title_es: 63% de estadounidenses cree que IA avanza demasiado rápido
bajada: Una encuesta de Pew Research muestra que aunque el 49% de estadounidenses usa chatbots ocasionalmente, el 63% piensa que la tecnología avanza demasiado rápido. El uso de ChatGPT se duplicó desde 2023.
bajada_en: A Pew Research poll shows that while 49% of Americans occasionally use chatbots, 63% think the technology is advancing too quickly. ChatGPT usage has doubled since 2023.

title: Operating a Humanoid With Your Body Is a Hot Job in China’s Hardware Capital
summary: In Shenzhen, workers at IO-AI Tech control humanoid robots using a VR rig reminiscent of Ready Player One.
title_es: En Shenzhen operan robots humanoides desde rigs VR
bajada: Trabajadores en Shenzhen controlan robots humanoides usando equipos VR similar a Ready Player One. La práctica se está convirtiendo en un trabajo demandado en el hub de hardware chino.
bajada_en: Workers in Shenzhen control humanoid robots using VR rigs similar to Ready Player One. The practice is becoming a sought-after job in China's hardware hub.

title: Massive breach spills credentials for thousands of sensitive networks
summary: The affected include Oracle, Lenovo, FedEx, a NATO contractor, and Fortinet.
title_es: Breach masivo expone credenciales de redes sensibles
bajada: Un breach importante filtró credenciales de miles de redes sensibles incluyendo Oracle, Lenovo, FedEx y un contratista de la OTAN. El incidente destaca vulnerabilidades críticas en infraestructura corporativa.
bajada_en: A major breach exposed credentials for thousands of sensitive networks including Oracle, Lenovo, FedEx, and a NATO contractor. The incident highlights critical vulnerabilities in corporate infrastructure.

title: Only 16 Percent of Americans Think AI Will Have a Positive Impact on Society
summary: Article URL:https://techcrunch.com/2026/06/17/only-16-percent-of-americans-think-ai-will-have-a-positive-impact-on-society-a-new-study-shows/Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48573332Points: 363# Comments: 434
title_es: Solo 16% de estadounidenses ve impacto positivo de IA
bajada: Un nuevo estudio reveló que apenas el 16% de estadounidenses cree que la IA tendrá un impacto positivo en la sociedad. Este dato refleja una brecha significativa entre adopción tecnológica y confianza pública.
bajada_en: A new study found that only 16% of Americans believe AI will have a positive societal impact. This data reflects a significant gap between technology adoption and public trust.

title: The hacker sent by Anthropic to calm the government's nerves about AI safety
summary: Readable:https://www.wsj.com/tech/ai/anthropic-mythos-safety-nicholas...Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48575451Points: 67# Comments: 76
title_es: Experto en seguridad de Anthropic intenta calmar al gobierno
bajada: Nicholas Carlini, experto en seguridad de Anthropic, está trabajando con el gobierno para abordar preocupaciones sobre la seguridad de modelos avanzados como Mythos. Sus esfuerzos buscan restaurar la confianza regulatoria.
bajada_en: Nicholas Carlini, Anthropic's security expert, is working with the government to address concerns about advanced model safety like Mythos. His efforts aim to restore regulatory trust.
